description: Single chip long-context inference, Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct (128K context). OOM on some batch sizes is expected and recorded.
_batch_sizes_note: For offline scenario: max concurrent requests. Maps to max_num_seqs in vLLM. OOM at batch_size=4 is expected and recorded.
_request_count_note: offline uses 100, interactive uses 50 (controlled in loadgen). No online scenario for suite_D.
